markdown.content:
## Agent Process Health
Memory, GC, CPU, and threading metrics for the logship agent process.

kusto.query:
let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize workingSet = agg_max(workingSetBytes), privateMemory = agg_max(privateMemoryBytes) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| multi-project (timestamp:datetime, value:double, metric:string, machine:string) [
    timestamp, workingSet, "workingSet", machine,
    timestamp, privateMemory, "privateMemory", machine
]
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Process Memory Usage", fill = true, legend = true, yUnit = "bytes", spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize gcHeap = agg_max(gcHeapSizeBytes), gcAllocated = agg_max(gcTotalAllocatedBytes) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| multi-project (timestamp:datetime, value:double, metric:string, machine:string) [
    timestamp, gcHeap, "gcHeap", machine,
    timestamp, gcAllocated, "gcAllocated", machine
]
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "GC Heap & Total Allocated", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, yUnit = "bytes", spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize gen0 = agg_max(gen0Collections), gen1 = agg_max(gen1Collections), gen2 = agg_max(gen2Collections) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| multi-project (timestamp:datetime, value:double, metric:string, machine:string) [
    timestamp, gen0, "gen0", machine,
    timestamp, gen1, "gen1", machine,
    timestamp, gen2, "gen2", machine
]
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "GC Collections by Generation", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize fragmentation = agg_max(gcFragmentationBytes) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, fragmentation, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "GC Fragmentation", fill = true, legend = true, yUnit = "bytes", spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize threads = agg_max(threadCount) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, threads, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Thread Count", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize handles = agg_max(handleCount) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, handles, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Handle Count", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.process
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize cpuMs = agg_max(totalProcessorTimeMs) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| project timestamp, cpuMs, machine
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Total CPU Time", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, yUnit = "milliseconds", spanGaps = "auto")
